forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly sunny. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 16.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost on and east of the ranges. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 25.
Partly cloudy. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sunny. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
Sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the far northeast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeasterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.
